title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - Yes
scenario: Verify that tapping "Clear" under "Clear Trusted Devices" and confirming with "Yes" clears the trusted devices list, disconnects the headset, and removes it from paired devices.
steps: Open Lens App with headset connected, go to Device Settings > Reset Device tab. Verify "Restore Defaults" and "Clear Trusted Devices" fields are present with appropriate text and buttons.
Tap "Clear" button. Verify a confirmation popup appears with "Device power off is required..." text and "No" and "Yes" buttons.
Tap "Yes". Verify the app returns to home screen and headset shows as disconnected.
Go to Bluetooth settings. Verify device shows as "Not Connected" in My Devices list.
Tap on the device. Verify it disappears from My Devices and appears in Other Devices available for pairing.
expected: Tapping "Clear" under "Clear Trusted Devices" in the Reset Device tab, then confirming with "Yes", clears the trusted devices list.
